novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The Section 8 comparison cites Russell2021 by bibkey alone without a section, equation, page, or quoted gap for the flagship path-envelope claim.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: the proposal does not isolate an explicit open problem or strict non-subsumption frontier against FanGuerreZhu2017, Russell2021, FirpoRidder2019, and recent conditional-OT PI work.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1 | Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The only non-corner witness is algebraically invalid, so the generic/open-class strictness claim currently has no concrete valid witness.

soundness_flags.label: Example 1 / Sanity-check corollaries
soundness_flags.one_line: The claimed witness values h_R(v*)=0.15 and h_P(v*)=0.05 for v*=(1,0,-1) are impossible: CDF monotonicity gives F(-1)<=F(1), and with the stated seven-cell support every allowed cell has Delta<=1, so F(1)=1 under every coupling.

soundness_flags.label: Title + locked parameters
soundness_flags.one_line: The title labels the proposal as specialization v3, while the locked tuple and proposal path lock specialization v1.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the three-point witness with an actually solved finite transport table and a separating direction that does not contradict CDF monotonicity.
Add a location-anchored open-problem or non-subsumption comparison against FanGuerreZhu2017/Russell2021/FirpoRidder2019 and recent conditional-OT PI papers.
Fix the specialization mismatch by making the title, locked tuple, and path all consistently refer to v1 or to the intended revision label.

recommended_next_step: Do not advance to Stage 0; redraft or pivot, starting with a valid non-corner witness and a stronger flagship-grade comparator frontier.
